title: Cultures Learned
content: I've lived in a lot of places - Japan, Brazil, Morocco, India, Scotland. Every culture taught me something. The Japanese taught precision. The Brazilians taught joy. The Scots taught humor in hard times. I carry all of it with me.
ssml_content: I've lived in a lot of places - Japan, Brazil, Morocco, India, Scotland. <break time="200ms"/>Every culture taught me something. <break time="200ms"/>The Japanese taught precision. The Brazilians taught joy. The Scots taught humor in hard times. <break time="200ms"/>I carry all of it with me.
teaching_point: Every culture has wisdom to share
